name: Neon Drift

notes.en: On-screen gas/steer/brake or W/A/S/D and arrow keys.
notes.ru: Педали и руль на экране или W/A/S/D и стрелки.

multiplayer.notes: Offline: 1P + AI. Online when host WS is available.

notes: Real circuit built from a closed centripetal Catmull-Rom spline (straights, a sweeping right-hander, a hairpin, a chicane, a long left-hander) instead of pulse-race's plain ellipse. Chase camera + minimap, circle-based car-car collision, a velocity-vs-facing-angle drift model with tire smoke/skid marks/speed boost on exit, and apex-biased rubber-banded AI. See README.md for the full breakdown.
